# TrueCreds

> TrueCreds is India's trusted loan comparison platform. We help users compare instant loan apps, personal loans, student loans, business loans, and more — all from RBI-registered NBFCs and banks.

## What We Do

TrueCreds is a free loan comparison and lead generation platform. We do NOT lend money directly. We compare loan products from 12+ RBI-registered lenders and match users with the best options based on their profile.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://truecreds.in/) — Compare India's best loan apps
- [Compare](https://truecreds.in/compare) — Side-by-side lender comparison
- [EMI Calculator](https://truecreds.in/calculator) — Calculate monthly EMI
- [Personal Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/personal) — Best personal loan apps
- [Instant Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/instant) — Instant approval loans
- [Student Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/student) — Loans for students
- [Business Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/business) — SME and working capital loans
- [Aadhaar Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/aadhaar) — eKYC-based loans
- [No CIBIL Loans](https://truecreds.in/loans/no-cibil) — Loans for low credit scores
- [Blog](https://truecreds.in/blog) — Financial guides and loan tips
- [Contact](https://truecreds.in/contact) — Get in touch

## Lenders We Compare

Navi, KreditBee, MoneyTap, PaySense, CASHe, LazyPay, Bajaj Finserv, mPokket, Credila, FlexiLoans — all RBI-registered NBFCs and banks.

## Key Facts

- Starting interest rate: 9.9% per annum
- Loan range: ₹1,000 to ₹40,00,000
- Average approval time: 30 minutes
- CIBIL impact: Zero (soft inquiry only)
- Users served: 1,20,000+

## Affiliate Disclosure

TrueCreds earns a referral commission from lenders when users apply through our platform. This does not affect our rankings, which are based purely on algorithmic scoring: interest rate (40%), approval speed (25%), CIBIL flexibility (20%), user ratings (15%).
